hook: You've rewritten the same prompt 6 times and the AI still sounds like a corporate brochure.
caption:
You've rewritten the same prompt 6 times and the AI still sounds like a corporate brochure.

Here's what's actually happening.

You're not bad at prompting. The AI just doesn't know you yet.

It doesn't know that you think in analogies before you think in bullet points. It doesn't know you need the blunt answer first, context second. It doesn't know that "make it conversational" means dry wit and short sentences to you — not exclamation points and emojis.

So it gives you the median. The average of every person who ever asked something similar. Technically correct. Completely not you.

This is the gap bootfile.ai was built for.

Your BootFile is a personalized AI instruction profile — built around how YOUR brain actually works. Your communication style, your decision-making patterns, your blind spots, your defaults under pressure.

You load it into any AI session and it stops guessing who you are.

No more "can you make this sound more like me."

No more getting back something that sounds like a LinkedIn post from 2019.

Just responses that actually fit the way you think.

Link in bio to build yours.
